sections.paragraph:
ἐμπορία, ας, ἡ (s. prec. and two next entries; Hes., Hdt. et al.; SIG 185, 32 [IV b.c.]; OGI 629, 164; SEG XXVI, 1392, 47; PTebt 6, 25 [II b.c.]; PGiss 9, 3; POxy 76, 10; CPJ 4526, 14 ἐ. Ἰουδαίων; LXX; EpArist 114; Jos., C. Ap. 1, 60; 61; TestJos 11:5; TestAbr A 2 p. 79, 10 [Stone p. 6]; loanw. in rabb.) the business or work in which one engages business, trade Mt 22:5. ἐμπορίαν ἀσκεῖν engage in business 2 Cl 20:4 (the verb also governs θεοσέβειαν).—DELG s.v. ἔμπορος. M-M.

prec. prec. = preceding

Hes Hes , date uncertain, perh. before VI b.c.—List 5

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

et et al. = et alii (and others)

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

SEG SEG = Supplementum Epigraphicum Graecum—List 3

PTebt PTebt = The Tebtunis Papyri—List 4

PGiss PGiss = Griechische Papyri . . . zu Giessen—List 4

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

CPJ CPJ = Corpus Papyrorum Judaicarum—List 4

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

EpArist EpArist = Epistle of Aristeas, II b.c.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

TestJos TestJos = Testament of Joseph, s. Test12Patr—List 2

TestAbr TestAbr = Testament of Abraham, with some interpolations; I b.c./I a.d.—Lists 2, 5

loanw. loanw. = loanword

rabb. rabb. = rabbinical (literature etc.)

2 Cl 2 Cl = 2 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 324
